name: Coconut Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening until soft.
2. Add sugar and cream until fluffy.
3. Gradually add water, mixing well after each addition.
4. Incorporate the remaining ingredients in order, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Finish by adding nuts and shredded coconut.
6. Form into rolls and wrap tightly in waxed paper.
7. Chill for several hours in the refrigerator.
8. Slice into rounds that are 1/8 inch thick.
9. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 375°F for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
Makes 48.
